candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: Resource-preserving entailment from sentinel next/prev ownership and xizi_dllseg first head head last l to pure(first = head <-> l = nil) conjoined with the unchanged spatial precondition.
candidate_helper_declarations.destination: group-local case_lib; declaration name must end with this group's helper_namespace suffix

proof_groups.proof_strategy: Prove the group-suffixed empty-characterization helper by destructing l. The nil case follows by simplifying xizi_dllseg; in the cons case, first=head makes node_store own the same head next/prev locations already owned by the sentinel frame, yielding contradiction from separation. Prove the entail witness by unfolding xizi_dll and cancellation. For each return witness apply the helper, discharge the pure implication pair from PreH1, and fold xizi_dll with first/last.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_entail_w: Select the left disjunct, rewrite linklist_pre=head, unfold xizi_dll, instantiate last/first, cancel.
per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_empty_return_w: Select the full return disjunct; helper plus first<>head gives l<>nil; discharge both implications and fold xizi_dll.
Select the full return disjunct; helper plus first=head gives l=nil; discharge both implications and fold xizi_dll.

premise_discharge.return_wit_1_branch_fact: PreH1 first<>head plus the helper equivalence.
premise_discharge.return_wit_2_branch_fact: PreH1 first=head plus the helper equivalence.

proof_groups.grouping_reason: All targets are in one function, use the same xizi_dll/xizi_dllseg fold-unfold pattern, and the two nontrivial targets share one helper. The group contains 3 witnesses, within max_witnesses_per_group=12.
